filament_start_gcode: ; filament start gcode {if (bed_temperature[current_extruder] >55)||(bed_temperature_initial_layer[current_extruder] >55)}M106 P3 S200 {elsif(bed_temperature[current_extruder] >50)||(bed_temperature_initial_layer[current_extruder] >50)}M106 P3 S150 {elsif(bed_temperature[current_extruder] >45)||(bed_temperature_initial_layer[current_extruder] >45)}M106 P3 S50 {endif} {if activate_air_filtration[current_extruder] && support_air_filtration} M106 P3 S{during_print_exhaust_fan_speed_num[current_extruder]} {endif}
data.name: addnorth PLA Economy
